title: A Dog After Love
content:
After you left me
I let a dog smell at
My chest and my belly. It will fill its nose
And set out to find you.

I hope it will tear the
Testicles of your lover and bite off his penis
Or at least
Will bring me your stockings between his teeth.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Yehuda Amichai delivers a powerful performance in "A Dog After Love"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
